title: 有馬記念の後に・昂揚

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I've always been chasing after her.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (But now... It's time to overtake her!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond crosses the finish line in first
place! The unbreakable diamond has crushed her
rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Aghhh! Nooo! I can't believe I looooost!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But that was soooo much fun!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! I had a lot of fun too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And now, we'll get to experience this thrill many
times over!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Congrats, Diamond! You were so awesome out
there!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: That race was the best! Great run, Satono!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Everyone's waiting for you, Dia! C'mon, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Satono Diamond! Can you tell
us how you're feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I am very happy to have run such a great race to
close out my classic year.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've spent this past year striving to achieve my
goal of winning the Classic Triple Crown, and it
hasn't been easy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
All sorts of things have happened, some
completely unexpected.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Could you be more specific?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
For example, the weather at the Satsuki Sho was
worse than I could have anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Races in the Twinkle Series can be downright
grueling at times... However, today's was
wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I would also like to thank all of my opponents
from the bottom of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe! No, thank you! But I'm not gonna lose next time!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeahhh! Kitasan! I'll be here cheering for you next
time too!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: We'll be rooting for you too, Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
As childhood friends and self-declared rivals,
have you two decided when your next showdown
will be?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Not yet...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run in the Osaka Hai and take back the
top spot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean she's going for the Senior Spring
Triple Crown?! Go get it, Kitasan!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I will! And I hope you'll all be there watching!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm going to run in the Osaka Hai too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We still haven't discussed the plan for her senior
year yet, let alone her next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond quickly glances in my direction
before turning back to the stands and repeating
herself.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm going to run against Kita in the Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
The rivalry between Satono Diamond and Kitasan
Black continues!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen was only the beginning... Wooo!
I'll be there to watch the next one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers erupt from the stands and things show no
sign of calming down. Kitasan Black then invites
the other racers into the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume stand in a line and look up at
the stands. They raise their hands and wave to the
spectators.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Here's to another great year! Hope to see you all
again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry for not consulting with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as we make it back to the waiting room,
Satono Diamond bows deeply in apology.
choice_data_list: You really want to race in the Osaka Hai next?
You really want to race in the Osaka Hai next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no problem with the distance or timing of
the race. I just need to make sure this aligns with
her dream of becoming an illustrious
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The Osaka Hai is a G1 race, so I don't see
any problem with it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
When I saw Kita in the winner's circle today... I
realized yet again how amazing she is.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I won the race, but I feel like I still haven't caught
up to her...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You saw how the crowd was smiling, didn't you?
You heard the roar of their cheers.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita's running brings excitement to the Twinkle
Series. Everyone loves watching her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I feel like that's part of being an illustrious
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I still don't quite understand
what exactly an illustrious runner is supposed to
be like.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
In Kita's case, maybe it's that special something
about her when she runs that makes people want
to cheer her on.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Her style of running has the ability to draw fans in
and captivate them.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...I don't think I could induce the same kind of
wild enthusiasm as a daughter of the Satono
family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her will is strong and unwavering. She's always
noble and never shows weakness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's frustrating that those qualities essentially
mask her efforts. She shines magnificently, and is
no less impressive than Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thanks for saying so... But I'm okay.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to find out what being illustrious means
to me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How can I contribute to the Umamusume world as
Satono Diamond?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I feel like if I continue to watch and chase after
Kita, I'll be able to figure out my own path.
choice_data_list: All right. Then, next up is the Osaka Hai!
All right. Then, next up is the Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still searching for an answer to what it means to
be illustrious, Satono Diamond forges ahead into
her senior year.
